parser_claim: The active runtime profile is identification_marker + topic_or_object + optional particle, with a second 就係 + noun-phrase fallback and no accepted child-label fixture family.
exact_locator: main.js CONSTRUCTION_TEMPLATES and 就係 fallback; legitimacy and coverage records
source_proposition: The label is an implementation wrapper around focus/copular material rather than a source-derived construction boundary.
implementation_effect: Retain the exact runtime footprint as provenance while separating ordinary copular/focus structure from discourse-particle uses.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer linguistic legitimacy from active code or from the label name.

parser_claim: Cantonese 係 can link a subject or demonstrative nominal to an identifying nominal predicate.
source_proposition: The reference grammar treats 係 as the copula in nominal identification and classification patterns.
implementation_effect: Map overt 係/就係 material through an ordinary copular or focus relation before considering fragment status.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every 就係 + NP sequence is an autonomous fragment or that the subject is always absent.

parser_claim: A contemporary corpus contains a full discourse sequence with 呢 followed by 就係 and a demonstrative nominal expression.
source_proposition: The attested sequence is 我想講講呢就係嗰個少數族裔嘅福利同埋權利 in a discussion of non-deictic demonstratives.
implementation_effect: Preserve the possibility that 就係 participates in a larger discourse structure.
forbidden_inference: Do not reanalyze this full sequence as proof of isolated 就係 + arbitrary NP fragment productivity.

parser_claim: The utterance-particle-like form 就係啦 has a particle-dependent distribution distinct from ordinary copular/focus 就係.
source_proposition: Tang contrasts Cantonese 就係啦 with bare *就係 in that utterance-particle use and notes that 係啦 is possible.
implementation_effect: Do not model the final particle as freely optional across the utterance-particle subtype.
forbidden_inference: Do not extend the starred judgment to all ordinary copular or focus uses of 就係.

parser_claim: No inspected external source establishes the runtime cross-product identification marker + arbitrary NP + optional particle as one fragment construction.
source_proposition: Available evidence supports component constructions and one particle-bound utterance contrast, not the full runtime template.
implementation_effect: Keep the label quarantined pending decomposition or exact construction evidence.
forbidden_inference: Do not fill the gap using runtime fixtures, translation intuition, or analogy.

parser_claim: Absence of an overt subject in discourse does not by itself authorize insertion of a hidden identity argument.
source_proposition: The runtime surface can be represented with overt marker and nominal material while discourse supplies the understood topic.
implementation_effect: Use a discourse-fragment relation only when context supports it; preserve overt tokens.
forbidden_inference: Do not manufacture a silent subject, demonstrative, or copular complement.

parser_claim: The best-supported future representation is ordinary copular/focus structure plus a separately licensed discourse-fragment or utterance-particle relation.
source_proposition: Particle-bearing utterance expressions and ordinary predicative material have different distributions even when their surfaces overlap.
implementation_effect: Split or realign the runtime wrapper rather than promote it as one productive fragment rule.
forbidden_inference: Do not import Tang’s full conjunction analysis as parser ontology.

parser_claim: The active runtime accepts 喺 + place-like material, optionally a particle, and may wrap a LocativePlacePhrase while treating the located figure as discourse-understood.
exact_locator: main.js LocativeFragment template, fallback, and locativeFragmentFromWrappedPlacePhrase
source_proposition: The label combines an overt locative phrase with an inferred fragment function; no accepted child-label fixture family independently validates the category.
implementation_effect: Separate the overt locative constituent from context-dependent answer/fragment interpretation.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the runtime wrapper as external evidence.

parser_claim: Preverbal 喺 locative phrases are independently documented Cantonese locative constituents.
source_proposition: Kwan distinguishes preverbal event-location phrases from postverbal result-location and other placement patterns.
implementation_effect: Retain the overt locative phrase as a source-linked component.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a standalone answer construction or all-purpose locative predicate from PP placement.

parser_claim: Cantonese location predicates are documented with an overt located entity and locative expression.
source_proposition: The reference provides full locative and motion patterns, including subjects and location expressions.
implementation_effect: Use full locative predication as the baseline analysis when the located entity is overt.
forbidden_inference: Do not delete an overt subject or promote every locative phrase to a fragment.

parser_claim: Spatial 喺度 and progressive 喺度 are not interchangeable analyses, and only the spatial continuation is available in the cited ellipsis contrast.
source_proposition: The progressive reading fails in the ellipsis example, while a spatial reading remains possible as a pragmatically unusual continuation.
implementation_effect: Preserve spatial versus progressive ambiguity and require contextual resolution.
forbidden_inference: Do not license progressive VP ellipsis from the spatial reading or treat all 喺度 forms as LocativeFragment.

parser_claim: The inspected sources do not directly establish bare 喺 + place as a general standalone locative answer with an optional particle.
source_proposition: Sources validate locative phrases and full predicates but not the exact runtime fragment cross-product.
implementation_effect: Keep standalone-fragment licensing context-dependent and provisional.
forbidden_inference: Do not use accidental held-out visibility or parser acceptance as external evidence.

parser_claim: A discourse-understood located figure should remain an unresolved contextual relation unless overtly recoverable, not a fabricated token or syntactic node.
source_proposition: The overt surface identifies a location phrase; the omitted discourse participant is not present in the token stream.
implementation_effect: Represent overt locative material and mark contextual dependence without hidden insertion.
forbidden_inference: Do not claim that every standalone location expression contains a syntactically deleted subject.

parser_claim: The strongest future design is LocativePlacePhrase or locative predication plus a separately licensed discourse-fragment relation.
source_proposition: The source distinguishes several locative placements and functions rather than one catch-all locative category.
implementation_effect: Realign the label compositionally; retain an explicit exact-template gap.
forbidden_inference: Do not collapse event location, static predication, result location, source, localizers, and short answers.

parser_claim: PossessiveNominalFragment is registry-only in the inspected runtime: it has no active construction template, fallback, accepted fixture family, or pattern-specific source edge.
exact_locator: main.js registry and CP018 fragment set; R17 coverage row
source_proposition: The label is dormant taxonomic debt rather than active parser behavior.
implementation_effect: Do not activate it; evaluate merge or retirement.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a Cantonese construction from registry membership.

parser_claim: Possessor + 嘅 can function referentially as “mine/yours/his” without an overt possessed noun.
exact_locator: Unit 5, printed p. 23; forms ngóh ge, léih ge, kéuih ge
source_proposition: The reference explicitly gives possessive pronoun + 嘅 both before a noun and independently with “mine/yours” readings.
implementation_effect: Source-link the overt headless possessor+嘅 nominal.
forbidden_inference: Do not posit a covert English-style pronoun or unrestricted deletion rule.

parser_claim: Possessor+嘅 expressions can serve as predicates with 係, and 係 may be understood in some full nominal-predicate sentences.
source_proposition: Examples contrast overt 係 + possessor+嘅 with sentences where the copula is understood and an overt subject remains.
implementation_effect: Distinguish headless nominal reference from a full possessive predicate clause.
forbidden_inference: Do not classify every possessor+嘅 occurrence as a discourse fragment.

parser_claim: Modifier+嘅 can form a referential headless nominal across more relations than possession.
source_proposition: Sio documents referential headless modifier-ge3 nominals and distinguishes them from sentence-final ge3.
implementation_effect: Map possessor+嘅 within the broader headless modifier nominal system.
forbidden_inference: Do not equate all headless 嘅 nominals with possession or import a silent noun analysis.

parser_claim: Sentence-final 嘅 and adnominal/headless nominal 嘅 must remain distinct despite surface identity.
source_proposition: The chapter explicitly distinguishes nominal ge3 environments from sentence-final ge3.
implementation_effect: Require local structural evidence before assigning nominal status.
forbidden_inference: Do not use token identity alone to create a possessive fragment.

parser_claim: Because the form is independently covered by headless nominal and nominal-predicate structures, the dormant fragment label should merge or retire.
source_proposition: No residual externally motivated behavior requires a separate PossessiveNominalFragment node.
implementation_effect: Preserve source-linked headless possessive nominal behavior under ordinary nominal structure.
forbidden_inference: Do not activate a duplicate fragment rule.

parser_claim: ModalResponseFragment is registry-only in the inspected runtime, with no active template, fallback, accepted fixture family, or pattern-specific source edge.
exact_locator: main.js registry and CP018 fragment set; R17 coverage row
source_proposition: The label does not currently implement a distinct modal-response construction.
implementation_effect: Treat it as dormant duplicate debt.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer productivity from its presence in a label set.

parser_claim: Core Cantonese auxiliaries generally cannot stand alone except where their complement is supplied by ellipsis.
exact_locator: printed pp. 81-98; especially early auxiliary diagnostics
source_proposition: Luke and Nancarrow distinguish auxiliary behavior from main verbs and identify ellipsis as the condition for apparent standalone use.
implementation_effect: Analyze a bare modal response through the lexical auxiliary plus context-licensed complement ellipsis.
forbidden_inference: Do not create a free-standing modal category independent of an antecedent.

parser_claim: Cantonese modal/auxiliary heads such as 會 and 可以 can license VP ellipsis, unlike modal adverbs in the cited contrasts.
source_proposition: The paper uses Cantonese contrasts to distinguish heads that license movement/ellipsis from adverbs that do not.
implementation_effect: Retain lexical-head-specific ellipsis licensing.
forbidden_inference: Do not generalize from two auxiliaries to every modal-like word or every discourse context.

parser_claim: Ellipsis licensing is non-uniform: 有/冇/未 license in the cited environment, while progressive 喺度 and some aspectual verbs do not.
source_proposition: The paper explicitly rejects a rule under which every functional or aspectual head licenses an omitted VP.
implementation_effect: Require lexical and construction-specific licensing rather than a generic response-fragment template.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that any short auxiliary/aspect form can stand as an answer.

parser_claim: Ellipsis licensing alone does not determine whether a surface is an answer, its polarity target, or the recovered proposition.
exact_locator: R18 comparison with R17 FragmentAnswer mapping
source_proposition: The response function depends on an antecedent question or proposition and cannot be read from modal token presence alone.
implementation_effect: Keep discourse relation and antecedent provenance separate from auxiliary syntax.
forbidden_inference: Do not insert a specific hidden VP when context is absent or ambiguous.

parser_claim: The dormant child label should merge into ordinary ModalVP/Auxiliary structure plus selective complement ellipsis and response discourse relations.
source_proposition: The externally supported behavior is already compositional; no separate ModalResponseFragment node is required.
implementation_effect: Retire or merge the duplicate label without changing runtime during the freeze.
forbidden_inference: Do not promote a new bare-modal response rule.

parser_claim: Cantonese prohibitives use specialized markers 咪 and 唔好, distinct from ordinary negation with 唔.
source_proposition: The paper defines prohibitives as negative imperatives and identifies 咪/唔好 as Cantonese prohibitive markers.
implementation_effect: Map overt marker+predicate forms under the existing prohibitive imperative analysis.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat ordinary 唔 + predicate as prohibitive without directive evidence.

parser_claim: 咪 and 唔好 are not established as freely interchangeable across predicates and final particles.
exact_locator: official repository abstract; corpus comparison description
source_proposition: The study reports different frequencies and investigates collocations with predicates and sentence-final particles.
implementation_effect: Preserve marker identity and lexical/discourse restrictions.
forbidden_inference: Do not encode one unrestricted negative-imperative slot from abstract-level evidence.

parser_claim: 唔好意思 is also a conventional apology expression and cannot be parsed compositionally as prohibition solely from its initial characters.
source_proposition: The reference lists 唔好意思 among polite apology expressions.
implementation_effect: Protect the lexicalized formula from the prohibitive rule while preserving overt-marker prohibitives elsewhere.
forbidden_inference: Do not classify every string beginning 唔好 as a prohibition.

parser_claim: No inspected source establishes a productive bare prohibitive-marker fragment separate from marker+predicate imperatives or lexicalized formulae.
source_proposition: The supported contrast concerns prohibitive constructions and formula-specific ambiguity, not an independent fragment node.
implementation_effect: Do not activate the dormant child label.

parser_claim: The dormant child label should merge into ProhibitiveImperative plus lexical-formula exceptions, or retire.
